description: The sporting season is back with a bang! Cheer your favourite Sports stars in style with this bandana from nike. Crafted from pure cotton with a sporty embroidered nike swoosh logo, this bandana is sure to keep you comfortable as you sweat it out with your favourite players.Warranty for manufacturing defects: 6 months (not valid on products with more than 20% discount) Width: 58 cm Care only hand wash Do not wring, tumble dry or iron
